text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Weeks pass without inicident, and Fine Motion's been happily
training away with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend
text_block_list.text: Later, Fine! Today was a real workout!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Go get some rest! See you tomorrow!
choice_data_list: You all worked really hard today.
You all worked really hard today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It was so much fun, I didn't notice how tired I am. Every day is
so lovely, it feels like I'm dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That aside, though—I think it's time we called it a day. Let's head
back to your office and have our meeting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run over my notes in my head, ready to wrap up the day, and then...
I unlock the office door to chaos.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wait... What happened?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A cabinet in the corner lies fallen, face down, its files scattered about
the crime scene.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... That's the thing—the room was locked with no one inside.
But surely the cabinet didn't knock itself over, with how far the
papers are scattered.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's like we're in a book! Oh, Trainer! I think we've stumbled upon a
bona fide mystery!
choice_data_list: Uhhh... Yeah, sure, let's go with that.
Uhhh... Yeah, sure, let's go with that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, don't you worry now... Detective Fine is on the case!
choice_data_list: I didn't take you for such a mystery buff...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, ahem... Now, we've got a crime scene to investigate! I've read
that observation is a detective's greatest asset.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...And would you look at that?! My dear assistant, I do believe our
perpetrator has left us footprints!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I told you I've got more than ramen up in my noggin! I bet
these tracks will lead us straight to the truth.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ..."Meow"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We follow the prints to my desk, where a cat looks up at us,
wide-eyed with apprehension.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see... The pieces are all coming together!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The culprit... is you!

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: MREOOOW!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's okay, we aren't mad at you. Come on out.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh? It looks like you've got a collar.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The question is, whose? I guess our poor little friend must have got
themself lost and wandered here.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Mew... Mreow!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shhh, don't worry. We'll help you get home.
choice_data_list: Think we can sleuth out who they belong to?
Think we can sleuth out who they belong to?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We'll have this case cracked in no time! First order of
business—asking around for clues. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We check if the students near my office saw anything and follow hints
through a grapevine of ramen joints around town until finally...

text_block_list.name: Pet Owner
text_block_list.text:
I can't thank you two enough! I was terrified we'd never find our little
baby!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It was our pleasure. We'll take our leave now, so have a wonderful
evening.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! I would say that's case closed! And I couldn't have done it
without my trusty sidekick.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that was fun. I wasn't expecting such an adventure.
choice_data_list: It's nice having a change of pace, huh?
It's nice having a change of pace, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it really is. Hehe, a little surprise to liven up the routine...
Something special...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I think I can arrange that.
